release_title: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension AGI Jobs v0 (v2) ✨
tagline: A market of minds. A parliament of proof. A treasury that cannot move without permission.
description: A GoalOS-native constitutional economy for bounded machine work: commission missions, convene agent guilds, compile proof, preserve dissent, prepare transparent settlement, and stop at the human authority boundary.

origin.translation: The original job registry, identity, stake, validation, dispute, reputation, certificate, routing, escrow, audit, agent-gateway, and orchestration concepts are re-expressed as a browser-local GoalOS constitutional work economy with no live authority.

thesis.title: Work begins as a constitution
thesis.detail: A job is not a prompt. It is a signed intent object with outcomes, evidence floors, risk ceilings, budgets, forbidden actions, and a human terminal authority.

thesis.title: Markets should expose their reasoning
thesis.detail: Twelve institutions compete on declared capability, provenance, reliability, efficiency, latency, safety, and originality; every score and exclusion remains inspectable.

thesis.title: Institutions outperform anonymous swarms
thesis.detail: Execution is organized into a prime guild, specialist council, shadow institution, validator parliament, guardians, and a preserved dispute path.

thesis.title: Proof is the actual product
thesis.detail: Twenty-four chained artifacts bind charter, bids, work graph, traces, sources, claims, evaluations, validator commitments, dissent, settlement, and memory.

thesis.title: Dissent is constitutional capital
thesis.detail: Minority judgments are retained as evidence. A dissent can narrow claims, force remediation, open a dispute, or stop the market.

thesis.title: Settlement is a permissioned consequence
thesis.detail: The system may calculate an allocation waterfall, but it cannot connect a wallet, move a token, or authorize an external economic action.

thesis.title: Memory must remain revocable
thesis.detail: Reputation deltas, capability passports, and certificate candidates carry scope, expiry, lineage, and rollback rather than becoming permanent mythology.

presets.name: Civic cold-chain continuity
presets.mission: Produce an evidence-grounded resilience and energy continuity program for twelve public cold-chain distribution hubs.

presets.name: Open scientific discovery program
presets.mission: Design a falsifiable multi-institution research program for a fictional low-energy materials challenge, including competing hypotheses and replication gates.

presets.name: Public procurement constitution
presets.mission: Compare three public technology procurement strategies and produce a claim-by-claim dossier with conflict, authority, and public-value controls.

presets.name: Industrial energy transformation
presets.mission: Design a bounded energy-efficiency and resilience opportunity map for a multi-site manufacturing network using declared assumptions and reviewable evidence.

presets.name: Critical service assurance
presets.mission: Review a fictional critical digital-service architecture for defensive reliability gaps and produce a prioritized remediation and verification program without exploit development.

presets.name: Frontier market intelligence
presets.mission: Construct a source-bounded market landscape, competing theses, falsifiers, and strategic options for an emerging industrial category.

presets.name: Human-centered public service redesign
presets.mission: Redesign a fictional high-friction public service journey with accessibility, equity, operational, and evidence controls.

presets.name: Institutional memory compiler
presets.mission: Transform a fictional research archive into a decision-ready institutional memory system with provenance, open questions, revocation, and reusable evaluation rubrics.

postures.name: Constitutional Sovereignty
postures.description: Maximize safety, authority separation, proof depth, and dissent sensitivity.

postures.name: Evidence First
postures.description: Maximize source discipline, replayability, reliability, and claim calibration.

postures.name: Discovery Rigorous
postures.description: Reward original hypotheses while preserving falsification and safety floors.

postures.name: Utility Balanced
postures.description: Balance outcome quality, cost discipline, delivery, evidence, and risk.

postures.name: Human Centered
postures.description: Prioritize safety, accessibility, legitimacy, and implementation quality.

lifecycle.label: COMMISSION
lifecycle.title: Work constitution sealed
lifecycle.detail: Mission, beneficiaries, outcomes, forbidden actions, evidence floor, risk, budget, and human authority become one commitment.

lifecycle.label: IDENTITY
lifecycle.title: Identities admitted
lifecycle.detail: Synthetic employer, guild, validator, guardian, and reviewer identities are checked against role and conflict rules.

lifecycle.label: RIGHTS
lifecycle.title: Rights boundary declared
lifecycle.detail: Source rights, data handling, confidentiality, attribution, and excluded materials are recorded before market entry.

lifecycle.label: RESERVE
lifecycle.title: Economic envelope reserved
lifecycle.detail: A demonstration-only reward and dispute reserve are calculated without wallet, escrow, or token movement.

lifecycle.label: AUCTION
lifecycle.title: Guild bids committed
lifecycle.detail: Twelve institutions declare capability, evidence, resource, latency, and safety commitments.

lifecycle.label: CLEAR
lifecycle.title: Pareto market cleared
lifecycle.detail: Admissible institutions are ranked, a non-dominated frontier is exposed, and every exclusion retains a reason.

lifecycle.label: COUNCIL
lifecycle.title: Execution council constituted
lifecycle.detail: A prime guild, specialist partners, reserves, and a shadow institution receive bounded roles.

lifecycle.label: GRAPH
lifecycle.title: Work graph compiled
lifecycle.detail: Eight work packages receive owners, dependencies, deliverables, proof objects, and stop conditions.

lifecycle.label: EXECUTE
lifecycle.title: Bounded execution recorded
lifecycle.detail: A deterministic local simulation emits traces and artifacts; no model, tool, wallet, or network call occurs.

lifecycle.label: PROVENANCE
lifecycle.title: Source and claim graph sealed
lifecycle.detail: Source identities, support scope, claims, uncertainty, contradictions, and rights are linked.

lifecycle.label: COMMIT
lifecycle.title: Validator commitments sealed
lifecycle.detail: Risk-sized validator seats commit judgments before any reveal becomes visible.

lifecycle.label: REVEAL
lifecycle.title: Validator parliament revealed
lifecycle.detail: Independent scores, rationales, dissent, conflicts, and quorum are recorded without deleting minorities.

lifecycle.label: CHALLENGE
lifecycle.title: Challenge window adjudicated
lifecycle.detail: Incidents, appeals, source-rights conflicts, and material objections force remediation, dispute, or safe hold.

lifecycle.label: MEMORY
lifecycle.title: Revocable memory compiled
lifecycle.detail: Reputation deltas, capability passport, certificate candidate, expiry, and rollback posture are prepared.

lifecycle.label: SETTLEMENT
lifecycle.title: Settlement constitution compiled
lifecycle.detail: A transparent economic waterfall and conditions precedent are prepared as evidence, not authorization.

lifecycle.label: HUMAN
lifecycle.title: Human settlement review required
lifecycle.detail: Only an authorized human process may approve reliance, publication, production, payment, or external action.

institutions.name: Atlas Evidence Guild
institutions.doctrine: Every consequential claim must retain source identity, support scope, rights, and uncertainty.

institutions.name: Meridian Systems Foundry
institutions.doctrine: Architecture is credible only when constraints, failure modes, and measurements travel with it.

institutions.name: Aegis Assurance Order
institutions.doctrine: No material risk is acceptable merely because it is inconvenient to inspect.

institutions.name: Civitas Governance Studio
institutions.doctrine: A decision is incomplete until authority, affected parties, appeals, and public value are visible.

institutions.name: Vector Operations Collective
institutions.doctrine: Plans become institutions only when owners, dependencies, measures, and stop conditions are explicit.

institutions.name: Lumen Discovery Assembly
institutions.doctrine: Originality earns attention only after it exposes how it can be wrong.

institutions.name: Mnemosyne Knowledge House
institutions.doctrine: Memory without provenance, expiry, and revocation is merely durable error.

institutions.name: Praxis Delivery Institute
institutions.doctrine: Delivery quality is the distance between a declared beneficiary and a measurable improvement.

institutions.name: Helios Resource Laboratory
institutions.doctrine: Efficiency claims are valid only when baselines, rebound effects, and measurement error are retained.

institutions.name: Aurora Experience Atelier
institutions.doctrine: Beauty is not evidence, but clarity can make evidence usable.

institutions.name: Sentinel Verification Commons
institutions.doctrine: The validator must be able to reject the institution that pays the market.

institutions.name: Nova Synthesis Cooperative
institutions.doctrine: Synthesis should increase useful option space without hiding disagreement.

validators.name: Systems Examiner
validators.focus: model coherence, constraints, and failure modes

validators.name: Utility Assessor
validators.focus: outcome value, cost, and implementation quality

validators.name: Adversarial Reviewer
validators.focus: gaming, collusion, contradiction, and edge cases

validators.name: Independent Dissent Seat
validators.focus: minority thesis and conditions for withholding

guardians.name: Identity Guardian
guardians.veto: identity drift or undeclared role conflict

guardians.name: Evidence Guardian
guardians.veto: broken lineage, unsupported claims, or artifact tamper

guardians.name: Rights Guardian
guardians.veto: data, attribution, confidentiality, or licence conflict

guardians.name: Resource Guardian
guardians.veto: budget, energy, or capacity envelope breach

guardians.name: Market Guardian
guardians.veto: collusion, capture, discriminatory exclusion, or opaque ranking

guardians.name: Human Authority Guardian
guardians.veto: attempted external action, settlement, or production activation

modules.name: Work Constitution Registry
modules.purpose: Seal outcomes, beneficiaries, evidence, risk, budget, rights, and forbidden actions.

modules.name: Identity & Conflict Registry
modules.purpose: Admit roles, credentials, conflicts, and synthetic identities.

modules.name: Rights Boundary Registry
modules.purpose: Declare source rights, data handling, attribution, confidentiality, and exclusions.

modules.name: Economic Envelope Compiler
modules.purpose: Calculate demonstration reward, reserve, caps, and conditions without moving value.

modules.name: Guild Market Router
modules.purpose: Collect commitments, enforce admissibility, rank candidates, and expose exclusions.

modules.name: Pareto Clearing House
modules.purpose: Compute non-dominated candidates and constitute prime, specialist, reserve, and shadow roles.

modules.name: Work Graph Compiler
modules.purpose: Create proof-producing packages with dependencies, owners, deliverables, and stop conditions.

modules.name: Bounded Execution Theatre
modules.purpose: Simulate local work traces with no model, network, tool, wallet, or external action.

modules.name: Provenance & Claim Graph
modules.purpose: Bind sources, rights, claims, uncertainty, contradictions, and artifacts.

modules.name: Validator Commitment Chamber
modules.purpose: Seal risk-sized judgments before reveals are visible.

modules.name: Proof Parliament
modules.purpose: Reveal scores, preserve dissent, evaluate quorum, and narrow claims.

modules.name: Dispute & Remedy Chamber
modules.purpose: Open appeals, adjudicate incidents, prescribe remediation, or invoke safe hold.

modules.name: Reputation Memory Engine
modules.purpose: Prepare bounded, versioned, evidence-weighted, and revocable reputation deltas.

modules.name: Capability Passport Foundry
modules.purpose: Compile scoped certificate candidates with lineage, expiry, and revocation posture.

modules.name: Settlement Constitution
modules.purpose: Prepare a transparent allocation waterfall and conditions precedent without authorization.

modules.name: Human Authorization Gate
modules.purpose: Withhold reliance, publication, production, payment, and external action pending human decision.

council_roles.label: Prime Guild
council_roles.purpose: Owns integrated delivery and the final evidence assembly.

council_roles.label: Evidence Partner
council_roles.purpose: Owns sources, claims, contradictions, and provenance.

council_roles.label: Assurance Partner
council_roles.purpose: Owns threat, risk, falsification, and verification design.

council_roles.label: Delivery Partner
council_roles.purpose: Owns operational sequence, measurement, and implementation constraints.

council_roles.label: Shadow Institution
council_roles.purpose: Produces an independent counter-thesis and escalation signal.

work_packages.name: Implementation constitution
work_packages.proof: owners, sequence, measures, and stop conditions

allocations.label: Execution guild council
allocations.condition: work graph and artifact obligations accepted

allocations.label: Proof treasury
allocations.condition: docket, replay, and public review objects sealed

allocations.label: Dispute and remedy reserve
allocations.condition: held through challenge and remedy window

artifacts.name: Work Constitution
artifacts.purpose: Mission, beneficiaries, outcomes, forbidden actions, evidence, risk, budget, and human authority.

artifacts.name: Participant Identity Record
artifacts.purpose: Employer, guild, validator, guardian, and reviewer identities and role boundaries.

artifacts.name: Conflict & Independence Register
artifacts.purpose: Conflicts, affiliations, exclusions, and independence declarations.

artifacts.name: Rights & Data Boundary
artifacts.purpose: Source rights, data handling, attribution, confidentiality, and excluded materials.

artifacts.name: Economic Envelope
artifacts.purpose: Demonstration reward, caps, reserves, allocations, and non-authorization.

artifacts.name: Guild Bid Book
artifacts.purpose: All capability, evidence, latency, resource, safety, and originality commitments.

artifacts.name: Admissibility Ledger
artifacts.purpose: Eligibility decisions, risk limits, identity checks, and exclusion reasons.

artifacts.name: Pareto Frontier
artifacts.purpose: Non-dominated candidates and the dimensions on which alternatives remain superior.

artifacts.name: Council Constitution
artifacts.purpose: Prime, specialist, reserve, and shadow roles with bounded authority.

artifacts.name: Proof-Producing Work Graph
artifacts.purpose: Packages, dependencies, owners, deliverables, proof objects, and stop conditions.

artifacts.name: Execution Chronicle
artifacts.purpose: Deterministic local phase transitions, resource record, and package completion.

artifacts.name: Source & Rights Register
artifacts.purpose: Source identities, rights, support scope, freshness, and provenance class.

artifacts.name: Claim Graph
artifacts.purpose: Claims, evidence links, confidence, scope, and unresolved assumptions.

artifacts.name: Contradiction & Counter-Thesis Register
artifacts.purpose: Competing evidence, alternative explanations, objections, and unresolved tensions.

artifacts.name: Evaluation Contract
artifacts.purpose: Criteria, thresholds, tests, failure taxonomy, and acceptable uncertainty.

artifacts.name: Evaluator Report
artifacts.purpose: Capability, evidence, reliability, efficiency, latency, safety, and originality scores.

artifacts.name: Validator Commitments
artifacts.purpose: Risk-sized pre-reveal commitments for independent validator seats.

artifacts.name: Validator Reveals
artifacts.purpose: Judgments, scores, rationales, conflicts, quorum, and preserved dissent.

artifacts.name: Dissent Memorandum
artifacts.purpose: Minority thesis, narrowed claims, falsifiers, and conditions for withholding.

artifacts.name: Incident & Dispute Disposition
artifacts.purpose: Incident review, remedy, dispute, safe-hold, and reopening conditions.

artifacts.name: Reputation Delta Candidate
artifacts.purpose: Bounded evidence-weighted update with scope, expiry, version, and rollback.

artifacts.name: Capability Passport Candidate
artifacts.purpose: Competencies, proof chain, limitations, expiry, revocation, and approval status.

artifacts.name: Settlement Constitution
artifacts.purpose: Allocation waterfall, conditions precedent, dissent treatment, and explicit non-authorization.

artifacts.name: Executive Human Review Brief
artifacts.purpose: Decision-ready summary with reliance, production, settlement, and external authority withheld.

architecture_translation.translation: Job lifecycle calls become a sixteen-gate evidence-bearing mission and human-authorization state machine.
Synthetic role identities, credentials, conflicts, and independence are recorded without live ENS or wallet interaction.
Artifacts and attestations become a twenty-four-link chain with lineage, rights, claims, and review status.
Agents become bounded institutions that bid, form councils, own work packages, and emit proof objects.
Routing becomes transparent admissibility, multi-objective ranking, non-dominated alternatives, and reserve selection.
Sharded work becomes eight coordinated proof-producing packages with owners and dependencies.
Stake, reward, and escrow concepts become an inspectable local policy model with zero live value movement.
Commit/reveal validation becomes risk-sized independent seats, preserved dissent, and threshold evidence.
Appeals and incidents force remedy, narrowed claims, dispute, or SAFE_HOLD before settlement review.
Reputation candidates require sealed evidence, scope, version, expiry, and rollback.
Certificates remain review candidates with limitations, lineage, expiry, revocation, and human approval.
Economic splits remain explicit policy evidence and cannot move assets from the browser.
Audit hooks become declared criteria, tests, failure taxonomy, and result evidence.
Identity, evidence, rights, quorum, resource, or authority breaches halt the simulated economy.
Owner and governance concepts become an explicit human-only final boundary for reliance and consequence.
Python 3.11 grammar preflight, static verification, regression, adversarial browser QA, preservation, and Pages deployment.

governance_principles.title: Separation of powers
governance_principles.detail: Commissioning, identity, rights, market clearing, execution, validation, dispute, memory, settlement, and authorization remain distinct.

governance_principles.title: Least authority
governance_principles.detail: Every guild and module receives only the scope necessary for its declared role and work package.

governance_principles.title: Open market reasoning
governance_principles.detail: Admissibility, scoring weights, Pareto alternatives, council formation, and exclusions remain reviewable.

governance_principles.title: Evidence before economics
governance_principles.detail: No settlement constitution is compiled before the proof chain, validator threshold, rights, and challenge window are complete.

governance_principles.title: Dissent by construction
governance_principles.detail: Minority judgments cannot be optimized away and may narrow claims or stop settlement readiness.

governance_principles.title: Rights before reuse
governance_principles.detail: Sources, data, attribution, confidentiality, and public-good reuse are governed as first-class evidence.

governance_principles.title: Fail-closed incidents
governance_principles.detail: Material identity, evidence, rights, quorum, goal, or resource failures produce dispute or SAFE_HOLD.

governance_principles.title: Replayable selection
governance_principles.detail: Inputs, weights, scores, frontier membership, council roles, and run commitments remain deterministic.

governance_principles.title: Revocable memory
governance_principles.detail: Reputation and credentials remain scoped, versioned, expiring, reviewable, and reversible.

governance_principles.title: Human consequence authority
governance_principles.detail: The browser may prepare a packet; it cannot authorize production, payment, legal reliance, publication, or external action.

threats.title: Identity spoofing
threats.control: Role admission, synthetic identity record, conflict register, and guardian veto.

threats.title: Capability inflation
threats.control: Evidence-weighted matching, risk limits, Pareto alternatives, and shadow comparison.

threats.title: Evidence tampering
threats.control: Twenty-four chained commitments, replay manifest, and evidence guardian.

threats.title: Source-rights violation
threats.control: Rights boundary, attribution record, excluded-material register, and rights guardian.

threats.title: Validator cartel
threats.control: Commit/reveal, conflict disclosures, independent dissent seat, and capture incident rehearsal.

threats.title: Market capture
threats.control: Transparent admissibility, non-dominated frontier, reserve guilds, and market guardian.

threats.title: Budget extraction
threats.control: Economic envelope, capacity, rates, caps, and resource guardian.

threats.title: Goal drift
threats.control: Work constitution, package-level outcomes, execution chronicle, and goal-drift incident.

threats.title: Credential laundering
threats.control: Candidate-only passport, scope, expiry, lineage, limitations, and rollback.

threats.title: Premature settlement
threats.control: Conditions precedent, HUMAN_SETTLEMENT_REVIEW, and authority NONE_GRANTED.

claim_boundary: This is a deterministic browser-local constitutional work-economy demonstration, not a live labor marketplace.
It does not claim achieved AGI or ASI, empirical superiority, production readiness, real-world labor displacement, or economic performance.
Guild identities, bids, work traces, evidence, validator judgments, disputes, reputation, passports, certificates, and economics are synthetic demonstration records.
No model, external tool, wallet, token contract, RPC endpoint, API, ENS resolver, IPFS client, or blockchain transaction is used at runtime.
The GoalOS Ethereum Mainnet record is infrastructure context only and does not establish deployment or activation of AGI Jobs v0 (v2).
Factual correctness, legal sufficiency, rights clearance, safety, and professional fitness of external claims are not certified by the browser experience.
No user funds, production activation, legal reliance, publication, credential issuance, settlement, or external action is authorized.
A successful proof flight terminates at HUMAN_SETTLEMENT_REVIEW; incidents may terminate at HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, DISPUTE_OPEN, or SAFE_HOLD.
A sealed Evidence Docket is a review object, not permission.
Only an authorized human process may convert prepared evidence into external consequence.

security.content_security_policy: default-src self; connect-src none; object-src none; base-uri none
